name: fh-meta
description: Hub meta-engineering toolkit for Claude Code — 23 skills + 3 agents. Covers the full hub operations lifecycle: harness diagnostics, external simulation, validation, plugin recommendation, reverse-harvest, onboarding wizard, marketplace readiness gate, decision-maker review, steel-quench all-angle verification, source-grounding-audit phantom-claim detection, self-marketing-lint, Socratic deep-clarify, and session self-evolution harvest loop.
